name: Saylor Advertising.Inc.
summary: Saylor Advertising.Inc. operates as an advertising company. It offers TV commercial, radio, newspaper, magazine, outdoor, traffic, poster, brochure, and flyer advertising services; and event, Web digital promotion, and promotion services. The company also provides marketing and sales promotion planning services; and event, exhibition, and ceremony planning and management services. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Takamatsu, Japan.
